findings.evidence: `rg -n "energyIntegrand_self_lower_bound_of_bounds" code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE` shows the new lemma at `GardingMass.lean:62` and an existing `private lemma energyIntegrand_self_lower_bound_of_bounds` at `CoerciveEnergy.lean:76`; both proofs decompose `energyIntegrand_self`, apply `garding_energyIntegrand_self_of_bounds`, rearrange by `ring`, and finish by `linarith`.
findings.fix: Make the existing `CoerciveEnergy.lean` helper public or move the shared lemma to the common dependency, then have both the coercivity theorem and the new wrappers call that single lemma.
findings.issue: `energyIntegrand_self_lower_bound_of_bounds` duplicates the existing private lemma of the same name in `CoerciveEnergy.lean`, so the same mass-floor bookkeeping proof is maintained in two places.

summary: The new public mass-floor lower-bound proof repeats an existing private proof instead of factoring the reusable estimate used by coercivity.
